ShortTermMomentumVolumeSignal_5D.description: This factor combines short-term price momentum with volume growth to capture the strength of recent price movements and increasing market participation. It uses a 5-day window for momentum and a 5-day window for volume change, then applies cross-sectional ranking to identify the strongest signals

variables.$return: Daily return of the stock on that day
variables.$volume: Volume of the stock on that day
variables.TS_MEAN($return, 5): Mean return over the past 5 days
variables.TS_PCTCHANGE($volume, 5): Percentage change in volume over the past 5 days

VolumeGrowthMomentum_20D.description: This factor integrates volume growth with 20-day momentum to provide a more stable signal for long-term trend identification. It uses a 20-day window for momentum and a 5-day window for volume change, then applies Z-score normalization to reduce noise and enhance interpretability

variables.$return: Daily return of the stock on that day
variables.$volume: Volume of the stock on that day
variables.TS_MEAN($return, 20): Mean return over the past 20 days
variables.TS_PCTCHANGE($volume, 5): Percentage change in volume over the past 5 days
